problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Combining Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
